case_title: CLUB DONATELLO HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS BLAS, MICHAEL W.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,532.00 FILED BY CLUB DONATELLO HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT BLAS, MICHAEL W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-23-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
